content:
Given the undirected dynamic graph with the edges:
[(1, 9, 2), (1, 8, 3), (1, 2, 4), (6, 9, 4), (3, 5, 8), (0, 1, 9), (5, 7, 9), (2, 8, 10), (4, 5, 12), (3, 8, 14), (6, 7, 14), (0, 5, 15), (1, 3, 16), (1, 6, 16), (5, 8, 16), (2, 3, 17)],

We need to find the nodes linked with node 4 exactly at time 12.

First, we will scan each edge (u, v, t) and collect the other node whenever the time t matches the queried time AND one of the nodes matches the queried node.

For time 12:

* Edge (1, 9, 2) has node 1 and time 12. -> Add node 9.
* Edge (1, 8, 3) has node 1 and time 3 (not 12). -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 2, 4) has node 1 and time 4 (not 12). -> Ignore.
* Edge (6, 9, 4) has node 6 and time 4 (not 12). -> Add node 9.
* Edge (3, 5, 8) has node 3 and time 8 (not 12). -> Ignore.
* Edge (0, 1, 9) has node 0 and time 9 (not 12). -> Add node 1.
* Edge (5, 7, 9) has node 5 and time 9 (not 12). -> Add node 7.
* Edge (2, 8, 10) has node 2 and time 10 (not 12). -> Ignore.
* Edge (4, 5, 12) has node 4 and time 12. -> Add node 5.
* Edge (3, 8, 14) has node 3 and time 14 (not 12). -> Ignore.
* Edge (6, 7, 14) has node 6 and time 14 (not 12). -> Add node 7.
* Edge (0, 5, 15) has node 0 and time 15 (not 12). -> Add node 5.
* Edge (1, 3, 16) has node 1 and time 16 (not 12). -> Ignore.
* Edge (1, 6, 16) has node 1 and time 16 (not 12). -> Add node 6.
* Edge (5, 8, 16) has node 5 and time 16 (not 12). -> Add node 8.
* Edge (2, 3, 17) has node 2 and time 17 (not 12). -> Ignore.

The nodes matched are 9, 7, and 5.

Answer: [9, 7, 5]
